name: Hershey Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and oleo until well combined.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the syrup and flour until just mixed.
4. Fold in nuts, if using.
5. Spread batter onto a greased and floured baking sheet.
6. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
7. Frost or dust with powdered sugar before serving.
